title: [phase:critique] [family:ui-runtime-review] [provider_hint:subagent] Review the current Happy production resolution. Facts: production /happy/ serves updated HTML with Live Session wired to /cockpit; /cockpit returns 200; unauthenticated GET /api/happy/state,/events,/task-detail return 401 by design...
summary_text: 1. **High**: Auth endpoint rate limiting is still `fail-open` on KV errors, so `/api/cockpit/auth/login`, `/refresh`, and `/reset-password` can become effectively unthrottled during KV outage/degradation. [rate-limiter.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/utils/rate-limiter.ts):180 2. **Medium**: Rate-limit increments are non-atomic (`get` then `put`), so concurrent requests can exceed configured limits (especially brute-force bursts). [rate-limiter.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/utils/rate-limiter.ts):143 [rate-limiter.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/utils/rate-limiter.ts):168 3. **Medium**: WebSocket auth is enforced at upgrade time, but not revalidated per message; demotion/deactivation after connect can retain active session privileges until disconnect. [cockpit-websocket.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/durable-objects/cockpit-websocket.ts):549 [cockpit-websocket.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/durable-objects/cockpit-websocket.ts):612 [cockpit-websocket.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/durable-objects/cockpit-websocket.ts):1278 4. **Low**: Password reset tokens are stored and matched in plaintext (not hashed), which increases blast radius if DB contents are exposed. [cockpit-api.ts](/Users/masayuki/Dev/cloudflare-workers-hub-deploy/src/handlers/cockpit-api.ts):695
